debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
X1 X2 : Set ↑A
h : HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A X1 = HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A X2
⊢ X1 ⊆ X2

proof:
by
  intros x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at this
  rcases this with ⟨z, hz, h_eq⟩
  rw [← Subtype.ext h_eq]
  exact hz
failed_attempts:
by
  intro x hx
  rcases h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ with ⟨x', hx', heq⟩
  rw [← Subtype.ext heq]
  exact hx'

by
  intros x hx
  obtain ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ := h ▸ (⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ : x.val ∈ val_image A X1)
  rw [← Subtype.ext heq]
  exact hx'
successful_attempts:
by
  intros x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at this
  rcases this with ⟨z, hz, h_eq⟩
  rw [← Subtype.ext h_eq]
  exact hz

by
  intro x hx
  have h1 : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at h1
  rcases h1 with ⟨z, hz, hzv⟩
  rw [← Subtype.ext hzv]
  exact hz

by
  intro x hx
  have h1 : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at h1
  rcases h1 with ⟨z, hz, hzv⟩
  rwa [Subtype.ext hzv] at hz

by
  intro x hx
  have h1 : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at h1
  let ⟨x', hx', hval⟩ := h1
  rw [← Subtype.ext hval]
  exact hx'

by
  intro x hx
  have h1 : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at h1
  obtain ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ := h1

  rw [← Subtype.ext heq]
  exact hx'

by
  intro x hx

  rw [h] at h1
  rcases h1 with ⟨z, hz1, hz2⟩
  rw [← Subtype.ext hz2]
  exact hz1

by
  intro x hx
  have h1 : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at h1
  rcases h1 with ⟨z, hz, hval⟩
  rw [← Subtype.ext hval]
  exact hz

by
  intro x hx
  let ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ := (h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ : x.val ∈ val_image A X2)
  rw [Subtype.ext heq] at hx'
  exact hx'

by
